prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约8545→8027→9532→9592→10621，近3年持续后移，2025年基准约10621名，较2024年后移约1029名，后移趋势明显；该校在贵州省物理类招生计划2021年62人、2022年61人、2023年61人、2024年69人、2025年69人；2026年计划70人，较2025年小幅扩招1人，扩幅约1.45%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第38名，近年排名稳定在36–39区间，学校层次较高；2025年高考周期内东 北大学因实习安全事故被评价为偏负面，2026年周期内因秦皇岛校区争议评价为中性/混合；抖音热度排名第82位，评价为一般，整体关注度不高；东北大学控 制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、冶金工程A、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-、软件工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，对理工类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与该校工科特色高度契合；贵州省2026年高考总人数约299000人，较2025年（物理类+历史类约297258人）略有增加；省控线方面，物理类本科批2025年387分较2024年380分小幅上升，竞争环境略趋紧；东北大学秦皇岛分校位于河北省秦皇岛市，非东北大学本部，但共享985品 牌；该校在贵州省招生占比约2.96%（2025年77人/全国2602人），属中等偏下水平，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招、贵 州省考生总数略有增加、省控线小幅上升以及声誉中性偏负面等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在2025年基准10621名基础上继续后移，预测最低位次约10743名，区间1024 3–11243名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8545 → 8027 → 9532 → 9592 → 10621, with a continuous backward shift in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is about 10621, a backward shift of about 1029 compared to 2024, showing a clear downward trend. The enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou Province for Physics Category was 62 in 2021, 61 in 2022, 61 in 2023, 69 in 2024, and 69 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 70, a slight expansion of 1 student compared to 2025, an increase of about 1.45%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 38th, with stable rankings in the 36–39 range in recent years, indicating a high university level. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, Northeastern University received somewhat negative evaluations due to a safety accident during internships, while in the 2026 cycle, due to controversies at the Qinhuangdao campus, evaluations are neutral/mixed. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, rated as average, with overall low attention. Northeastern University has A+ in Control Science and Engineering, A in Computer Science and Technology, A in Metallurgical Engineering, A- in Mechanical Engineering, A- in Materials Science and Engineering, and A- in Software Engineering, totaling 6 disciplines rated A- or above, strongly attracting science and engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning well with the university's engineering characteristics. The total number of examinees in Guizhou Province for the 2026 college entrance examination is approximately 299,000, a slight increase from 2025 (Physics Category + History Category about 297,258). Regarding the provincial control line, the Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 387 points, a slight increase from 380 in 2024, indicating a slightly tighter competitive environment. Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is located in Qinhuangdao City, Hebei Province, not the main campus, but shares the 985 brand. This university accounts for about 2.96% of enrollment in Guizhou Province (77 students in 2025 out of 2,602 nationwide), which is moderately low, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan, a slight increase in the total number of examinees in Guizhou Province, a slight rise in the provincial control line, and neutral to slightly negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 10621. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10743, with a range of 10243 to 11243.

- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Materials (Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- E-commerce
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, Japanese).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10243–11243, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Engineering, Internet of Things Engineering, Mechanical, Mathematics) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science and Technology, Automation, Communication Engineering) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Economics, Business Administration, Materials) as a safety. For rankings better than the lower limit (<10243), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the upper limit (>11243), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1393 → 4101 → 2057 → 2091. In 2023, due to only 1 enrollment spot for Ethnology, the ranking fluctuated significantly. In 2024, after expanding to 8 spots, the ranking stabilized in the 2057–2091 range. The 2025 baseline is approximately 2091. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guizhou Province was 1 person in 2022, 1 person in 2023, 8 persons in 2024, and 8 persons in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 9 persons, an increase of 1 person compared to 2025, an expansion of about 12.5%, slightly easing competition but with limited effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 38th in the Soft Science Ranking, with a high level that also attracts liberal arts candidates. In 2025, there was a slightly negative incident (campus safety event), and in 2026, the reputation is neutral/mixed (campus controversy). Douyin popularity is average, with overall low attention. Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines are mainly in engineering, and the History Category enrollment majors (Economics, Business Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature, Ethnology) have no directly corresponding A-class disciplines, so disciplinary appeal is average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economics is divided and wait-and-see, Business Administration is clearly discouraged, Foreign Languages and Literature is generally wait-and-see, and liberal arts majors overall have low popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000. The proportion of History Category examinees can be estimated based on recent years (about 30%), with an expected 89,700 History Category examinees, roughly the same as the 90,087 in 2025. Regarding provincial control lines, the History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 458 points, significantly higher than 442 points in 2024, indicating slightly intensified competition. Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is located in Hebei Province, not a local university, so its regional appeal to Guizhou liberal arts candidates is average. The university's History Category enrollment in Guizhou Province is only 8–9 persons, a very small proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking in the 2057–2091 range from 2024 to 2025, the planned expansion of 1 spot in 2026, the rise in provincial control lines, and the differentiation in liberal arts major popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 2091. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2263, with a range of 1924–2602.
